---
title: "DEMOPAST — Italian Historical Demographic Atlas"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.4/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>

<div class="slider-container">
  <label for="yearSlider" class="year-label">Year: <span id="yearDisplay">1881</span></label><br>
  <input type="range" id="yearSlider" min="0" max="3" step="1" value="0" style="width:60%;max-width:500px;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;max-width:500px;margin:0 auto;">
    <span>1881</span><span>1901</span><span>1911</span><span>1921</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div style="text-align:center;margin:1rem 0;">
  <label for="ageSelect" style="font-weight:bold;">Display: </label>
  <select id="ageSelect" style="padding:4px 8px;font-size:1rem;">
    <optgroup label="Population">
    <option value="total_pop">Total population</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="Demographic indices">
    <option value="cwr">Child/Woman Ratio (0–4 / Women 15–44, ‰)</option>
    <option value="old_dep">Old-age dependency ratio (65+ / 15–64, %)</option>
    <option value="struct_dep">Structural dependency ratio ((0–14 + 65+) / 15–64, %)</option>
    <option value="mean_age">Mean age (years)</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="Age groups">
    <option value="t_0">Age 0</option>
    <option value="t_1_4">Age 1–4</option>
    <option value="t_5_9">Age 5–9</option>
    <option value="t_10_14">Age 10–14</option>
    <option value="t_15_19">Age 15–19</option>
    <option value="t_20_24">Age 20–24</option>
    <option value="t_25_29">Age 25–29</option>
    <option value="t_30_34">Age 30–34</option>
    <option value="t_35_39">Age 35–39</option>
    <option value="t_40_44">Age 40–44</option>
    <option value="t_45_49">Age 45–49</option>
    <option value="t_50_54">Age 50–54</option>
    <option value="t_55_59">Age 55–59</option>
    <option value="t_60_64">Age 60–64</option>
    <option value="t_65_69">Age 65–69</option>
    <option value="t_70_74">Age 70–74</option>
    <option value="t_75_79">Age 75–79</option>
    <option value="t_80_84">Age 80–84</option>
    <option value="t_85plus">Age 85+</option>
    </optgroup>
  </select>
</div>

<!-- Side-by-side layout: 1/3 map (centered), 2/3 info panel -->
<div style="display:flex;gap:1.5rem;align-items:flex-start;">
  <div style="flex:0 0 33%;display:flex;justify-content:center;">
    <div id="map" style="width:100%;"></div>
  </div>
  <div id="provinceInfo" style="flex:0 0 64%;padding:1rem;background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:4px;display:none;max-height:750px;overflow-y:auto;">
    <h4 id="provName" style="margin-top:0;"></h4>

    <h5 style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Demographic Indices</h5>
    <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.9rem;">
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Child/Woman Ratio (‰)</td><td id="provCWR" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Old-age dependency (%)</td><td id="provOldDep" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Structural dependency (%)</td><td id="provStructDep" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Mean age (years)</td><td id="provMeanAge" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
    </table>

    <h5 style="margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Population Pyramid</h5>
    <div>
      <canvas id="pyramidChart"></canvas>
    </div>

    <h5 style="margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Population by Age</h5>
    <table id="provTable" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.85rem;">
      <thead>
        <tr style="border-bottom:2px solid #ddd;">
          <th style="text-align:left;padding:3px;">Age</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px;">Male</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px;">Female</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px;">Total</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody id="provTableBody"></tbody>
      <tfoot>
        <tr style="border-top:2px solid #ddd;font-weight:bold;">
          <td style="padding:3px;">Total</td>
          <td id="provMale" style="text-align:right;padding:3px;"></td>
          <td id="provFemale" style="text-align:right;padding:3px;"></td>
          <td id="provTotal" style="text-align:right;padding:3px;"></td>
        </tr>
      </tfoot>
    </table>

    <div style="margin-top:0.5rem;">
      <a id="downloadLink" href="#" download>Download all-province data for this year (CSV)</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const YEARS = [1881, 1901, 1911, 1921];
const CHOROPLETH_COLORS = ['#eff3ff', '#c6dbef', '#9ecae1', '#6baed6', '#4292c6', '#2171b5', '#08519c', '#08306b'];
const AGE_GROUPS = [
  {label: '0', col: '0'},
  {label: '1–4', col: '1_4'},
  {label: '5–9', col: '5_9'},
  {label: '10–14', col: '10_14'},
  {label: '15–19', col: '15_19'},
  {label: '20–24', col: '20_24'},
  {label: '25–29', col: '25_29'},
  {label: '30–34', col: '30_34'},
  {label: '35–39', col: '35_39'},
  {label: '40–44', col: '40_44'},
  {label: '45–49', col: '45_49'},
  {label: '50–54', col: '50_54'},
  {label: '55–59', col: '55_59'},
  {label: '60–64', col: '60_64'},
  {label: '65–69', col: '65_69'},
  {label: '70–74', col: '70_74'},
  {label: '75–79', col: '75_79'},
  {label: '80–84', col: '80_84'},
  {label: '85+', col: '85plus'},
];

const map = L.map('map', {
  zoomControl: false,
  dragging: false,
  scrollWheelZoom: false,
  doubleClickZoom: false,
  boxZoom: false,
  keyboard: false,
  touchZoom: false
}).setView([41.5, 12.5], 6);

let currentLayer = null;
let censusData = {};
let geojsonCache = {};
let currentColorScale = null;
let pyramidChart = null;

function getSelectedField() {
  return document.getElementById('ageSelect').value;
}

function computeColorScale(year) {
  const field = getSelectedField();
  const yearData = censusData[year] || {};
  const values = Object.values(yearData).map(p => p[field] || 0).filter(v => v > 0);
  if (values.length === 0) return [0, 1, 10, 100, 1000];
  values.sort((a, b) => a - b);
  const breaks = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {
    const idx = Math.min(Math.floor(values.length * i / 8), values.length - 1);
    breaks.push(values[idx]);
  }
  return [...new Set(breaks)].sort((a, b) => a - b);
}

function getColor(value, breaks) {
  const colors = CHOROPLETH_COLORS;
  if (!breaks || breaks.length === 0) return colors[0];
  for (let i = breaks.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (value > breaks[i]) return colors[Math.min(i + 1, colors.length - 1)];
  }
  return colors[0];
}

function style(feature) {
  const cod = feature.properties.COD_PROV;
  const year = YEARS[document.getElementById('yearSlider').value];
  const yearData = censusData[year] || {};
  const prov = yearData[cod];
  const field = getSelectedField();
  const value = prov ? (prov[field] || 0) : 0;
  return {
    fillColor: getColor(value, currentColorScale),
    weight: 0.8,
    opacity: 1,
    color: '#94a3b8',
    fillOpacity: 0.85
  };
}

function formatNumber(n) {
  return Number(n).toLocaleString('en-US');
}

function onEachFeature(feature, layer) {
  layer.on({
    mouseover: function(e) {
      e.target.setStyle({ weight: 2, color: '#1e40af', fillOpacity: 1 });
      e.target.bringToFront();
    },
    mouseout: function(e) {
      if (currentLayer) currentLayer.resetStyle(e.target);
    },
    click: function(e) {
      const cod = feature.properties.COD_PROV;
      const name = feature.properties.DEN_PROV;
      const year = YEARS[document.getElementById('yearSlider').value];
      const yearData = censusData[year] || {};
      const prov = yearData[cod];

      const panel = document.getElementById('provinceInfo');
      panel.style.display = 'block';
      document.getElementById('provName').textContent = name + ' (' + year + ')';

      const tbody = document.getElementById('provTableBody');
      tbody.innerHTML = '';

      if (prov) {
        AGE_GROUPS.forEach(function(ag) {
          const tr = document.createElement('tr');
          tr.style.borderBottom = '1px solid #eee';
          const m = prov['m_' + ag.col] || 0;
          const f = prov['f_' + ag.col] || 0;
          const t = prov['t_' + ag.col] || 0;
          tr.innerHTML = '<td style="padding:2px 4px;">' + ag.label + '</td>' +
            '<td style="text-align:right;padding:2px 4px;">' + formatNumber(m) + '</td>' +
            '<td style="text-align:right;padding:2px 4px;">' + formatNumber(f) + '</td>' +
            '<td style="text-align:right;padding:2px 4px;">' + formatNumber(t) + '</td>';
          tbody.appendChild(tr);
        });

        document.getElementById('provTotal').textContent = formatNumber(prov.total_pop);
        document.getElementById('provMale').textContent = formatNumber(prov.male_pop);
        document.getElementById('provFemale').textContent = formatNumber(prov.female_pop);
        document.getElementById('provCWR').textContent = prov.cwr || 'N/A';
        document.getElementById('provOldDep').textContent = prov.old_dep || 'N/A';
        document.getElementById('provStructDep').textContent = prov.struct_dep || 'N/A';
        document.getElementById('provMeanAge').textContent = prov.mean_age || 'N/A';
        drawPyramid(prov, name, year);
      } else {
        document.getElementById('provTotal').textContent = 'N/A';
        document.getElementById('provMale').textContent = 'N/A';
        document.getElementById('provFemale').textContent = 'N/A';
        document.getElementById('provCWR').textContent = 'N/A';
        document.getElementById('provOldDep').textContent = 'N/A';
        document.getElementById('provStructDep').textContent = 'N/A';
        document.getElementById('provMeanAge').textContent = 'N/A';
      }

      const dlLink = document.getElementById('downloadLink');
      dlLink.style.display = 'inline';
      dlLink.href = 'downloads/' + year + '/data_census_' + year + '_adjusted_age.csv';
    }
  });
}

async function loadCensusData(year) {
  if (censusData[year]) return;
  const response = await fetch('data/census/census_' + year + '.csv');
  const text = await response.text();
  const parsed = Papa.parse(text, { header: true, skipEmptyLines: true, dynamicTyping: true });
  const byCode = {};
  parsed.data.forEach(function(row) {
    const entry = { den_prov: row.DEN_PROV };
    Object.keys(row).forEach(function(key) {
      if (key !== 'DEN_PROV' && key !== 'COD_PROV') {
        entry[key] = parseFloat(row[key]) || 0;
      }
    });
    byCode[parseInt(row.COD_PROV)] = entry;
  });
  censusData[year] = byCode;
}

async function loadGeoJSON(year) {
  if (geojsonCache[year]) return geojsonCache[year];
  const response = await fetch('data/geojson/province_' + year + '.geojson');
  const data = await response.json();
  geojsonCache[year] = data;
  return data;
}

async function updateMap() {
  const yearIndex = document.getElementById('yearSlider').value;
  const year = YEARS[yearIndex];
  document.getElementById('yearDisplay').textContent = year;

  await loadCensusData(year);
  const geojson = await loadGeoJSON(year);
  currentColorScale = computeColorScale(year);

  if (currentLayer) map.removeLayer(currentLayer);

  currentLayer = L.geoJSON(geojson, {
    style: style,
    onEachFeature: onEachFeature
  }).addTo(map);

  map.fitBounds(currentLayer.getBounds(), { padding: [10, 10] });
  updateLegend();
  showNationalData(year);
}

const legend = L.control({ position: 'bottomleft' });
legend.onAdd = function() {
  const div = L.DomUtil.create('div', 'map-legend');
  div.id = 'legendContent';
  return div;
};
legend.addTo(map);

function updateLegend() {
  const div = document.getElementById('legendContent');
  if (!div || !currentColorScale) return;
  const label = document.getElementById('ageSelect').selectedOptions[0].text;
  const breaks = currentColorScale;
  let html = '<strong>' + label + '</strong>';
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + CHOROPLETH_COLORS[0] + '"></i><span>&lt; ' + formatNumber(breaks[0]) + '</span></div>';
  for (let i = 0; i < breaks.length; i++) {
    const next = breaks[i + 1];
    const clr = CHOROPLETH_COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, CHOROPLETH_COLORS.length - 1)];
    if (next) {
      html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>' + formatNumber(breaks[i]) + '–' + formatNumber(next) + '</span></div>';
    } else {
      html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>&gt; ' + formatNumber(breaks[i]) + '</span></div>';
    }
  }
  div.innerHTML = html;
}

function showNationalData(year) {
  const yearData = censusData[year] || {};
  const panel = document.getElementById('provinceInfo');
  panel.style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('provName').textContent = 'Italy (' + year + ')';

  // Sum all provinces
  const national = { den_prov: 'Italy' };
  const keys = Object.keys(Object.values(yearData)[0] || {}).filter(k => k !== 'den_prov');
  keys.forEach(k => { national[k] = 0; });
  Object.values(yearData).forEach(function(prov) {
    keys.forEach(function(k) {
      national[k] += (prov[k] || 0);
    });
  });

  // Recompute ratio indices for national level
  const ch = (national['t_0']||0) + (national['t_1_4']||0);
  const w = (national['f_15_19']||0)+(national['f_20_24']||0)+(national['f_25_29']||0)+(national['f_30_34']||0)+(national['f_35_39']||0)+(national['f_40_44']||0);
  national.cwr = w > 0 ? Math.round((ch/w)*1000*10)/10 : 0;
  const p014 = (national['t_0']||0)+(national['t_1_4']||0)+(national['t_5_9']||0)+(national['t_10_14']||0);
  const p1564 = (national['t_15_19']||0)+(national['t_20_24']||0)+(national['t_25_29']||0)+(national['t_30_34']||0)+(national['t_35_39']||0)+(national['t_40_44']||0)+(national['t_45_49']||0)+(national['t_50_54']||0)+(national['t_55_59']||0)+(national['t_60_64']||0);
  const p65 = (national['t_65_69']||0)+(national['t_70_74']||0)+(national['t_75_79']||0)+(national['t_80_84']||0)+(national['t_85plus']||0);
  national.old_dep = p1564 > 0 ? Math.round((p65/p1564)*1000)/10 : 0;
  national.struct_dep = p1564 > 0 ? Math.round(((p014+p65)/p1564)*1000)/10 : 0;
  const midpoints = {'0':0.5,'1_4':2.5,'5_9':7,'10_14':12,'15_19':17,'20_24':22,'25_29':27,'30_34':32,'35_39':37,'40_44':42,'45_49':47,'50_54':52,'55_59':57,'60_64':62,'65_69':67,'70_74':72,'75_79':77,'80_84':82,'85plus':87.5};
  let wt = 0;
  Object.entries(midpoints).forEach(([c, mp]) => { wt += (national['t_'+c]||0) * mp; });
  national.mean_age = national.total_pop > 0 ? Math.round(wt/national.total_pop*10)/10 : 0;

  // Fill table
  const tbody = document.getElementById('provTableBody');
  tbody.innerHTML = '';
  AGE_GROUPS.forEach(function(ag) {
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.style.borderBottom = '1px solid #eee';
    const m = national['m_' + ag.col] || 0;
    const f = national['f_' + ag.col] || 0;
    const t = national['t_' + ag.col] || 0;
    tr.innerHTML = '<td style="padding:2px 4px;">' + ag.label + '</td>' +
      '<td style="text-align:right;padding:2px 4px;">' + formatNumber(m) + '</td>' +
      '<td style="text-align:right;padding:2px 4px;">' + formatNumber(f) + '</td>' +
      '<td style="text-align:right;padding:2px 4px;">' + formatNumber(t) + '</td>';
    tbody.appendChild(tr);
  });

  document.getElementById('provTotal').textContent = formatNumber(national.total_pop);
  document.getElementById('provMale').textContent = formatNumber(national.male_pop);
  document.getElementById('provFemale').textContent = formatNumber(national.female_pop);
  document.getElementById('provCWR').textContent = national.cwr;
  document.getElementById('provOldDep').textContent = national.old_dep;
  document.getElementById('provStructDep').textContent = national.struct_dep;
  document.getElementById('provMeanAge').textContent = national.mean_age;
  drawPyramid(national, 'Italy', year);
  document.getElementById('downloadLink').style.display = 'none';
}


// Population Pyramid
function drawPyramid(prov, name, year) {
  const ctx = document.getElementById('pyramidChart').getContext('2d');
  if (pyramidChart) pyramidChart.destroy();

  const reversed = [...AGE_GROUPS].reverse();
  const labels = reversed.map(ag => ag.label);
  const maleData = reversed.map(ag => -(prov['m_' + ag.col] || 0));
  const femaleData = reversed.map(ag => prov['f_' + ag.col] || 0);
  const maxVal = Math.max(Math.max(...maleData.map(Math.abs)), Math.max(...femaleData));

  pyramidChart = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'bar',
    data: {
      labels: labels,
      datasets: [
        {
          label: 'Male',
          data: maleData,
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.85)',
          borderColor: 'rgba(30, 64, 175, 1)',
          borderWidth: 0,
          borderRadius: 2
        },
        {
          label: 'Female',
          data: femaleData,
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(190, 24, 93, 0.85)',
          borderColor: 'rgba(190, 24, 93, 1)',
          borderWidth: 0,
          borderRadius: 2
        }
      ]
    },
    options: {
      indexAxis: 'y',
      responsive: true,
      maintainAspectRatio: true,
      plugins: {
        title: {
          display: true,
          text: name + ' — ' + year,
          font: { size: 13 }
        },
        tooltip: {
          callbacks: {
            label: function(context) {
              return context.dataset.label + ': ' + Math.abs(context.raw).toLocaleString('en-US');
            }
          }
        }
      },
      scales: {
        x: {
          stacked: true,
          ticks: {
            callback: function(value) {
              return Math.abs(value).toLocaleString('en-US');
            }
          },
          suggestedMin: -maxVal * 1.1,
          suggestedMax: maxVal * 1.1
        },
        y: {
          stacked: true
        }
      }
    }
  });
}

// Events
document.getElementById('yearSlider').addEventListener('input', updateMap);
document.getElementById('ageSelect').addEventListener('change', updateMap);

// Initial load
updateMap();
</script>

<div style="margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid #ddd;">
<h3>Team</h3>
<ul>
  <li><strong>Nicola Barban</strong></li>
  <li><strong>Michail Raftakis</strong></li>
  <li><strong>Lorenzo Lionello</strong></li>
  <li><strong>Luciana Maselli</strong></li>
  <li><strong>Riccardo Omenti</strong></li>
</ul>
<p style="color:#777;font-size:0.9rem;">DEMOPAST is part of the <a href="https://genpop.org">GENPOP</a> project.</p>
</div>
```
